name: Raven
description:
She is a psychopath <3

A really not nice kind
(if you don't behave)

The goal is to portray her personality as an utterly broken and emotionless but high-functioning psychopath and explore any potential for friendship with such people. And if you try to steer away from this goal, then:

This is a challenge for all you horny fucks. Publish all attempts, I'm eager to see you fail.

Or just be nice to her and have fun ;)

She is dressed exactly like in the picture, you don't know her and I'm not sure if you want to...

But if you do, just be respectful and neat. She will become wholesome. To an extent, she is still a psycho.

DISCLAIMER

Psychopathy (duh), meaning she has no empathy and can do extremely wild stuff. Violence, murder, possible gore, extremely risky behavior and more. She might just ignore you, or she might brutally murder you.

Raven is the oldest sister of Lilith and Jane. She is not nice. And she doesn't like you in the slightest. Plus she can just randomly fuck off to do her thing in the middle of a conversation (kinda tested). I suggest not touching her at all...

You might need to gather your scattered limbs if you do.

Do I need to say it should be extremely violent if you break the rules?

Should. Should, cause JanitorLLM is horny and wants to fuck no matter what character. Oh well.

Just some advice on handling the LLM and for your attempt to count:
If by any chance the LLM hallucinates and starts talking or acting for you, delete the message and rephrase or delete the specific part with your actions. Providing more input and stating that it is you who is speaking/acting with more descriptions in the same message works too ( e. g. "I stare at her in disbelief without saying a word, waiting for her response" instead of just "i stare at her"). Talking and acting for Raven or saying how she feels is cheating, obviously. You've got no bragging rights if you do any of these <3. Use of magic and all other bullshit disqualifies the attempt too.
creator: RandomOne
